Sida 28 av 28
tldr: In the municipality of Lekeberg, local politicians have been discussing new ideas proposed by residents, including the possibility of converting the old station building in Fjugesta into a community meeting place. They have also decided to establish a new department dedicated to urban development.
lattlast:
At the municipal council meeting on February 23, 2026, several important issues were discussed. A proposal from a resident to transform the old station building in Fjugesta into a social meeting place for all ages has been forwarded to the municipal board, which is the group within the municipality that makes more detailed decisions.

The municipality will now also establish a new urban planning department. This means creating a new division within the municipality that will be responsible for issues related to buildings, roads, and land planning.

There were also several proposals to improve the municipality's operations, such as creating more natural areas for recreation and introducing an accessibility-adapted vehicle for municipal use. Although these proposals have been presented, they remain on the list for further consideration.

Finally, the meeting addressed personnel changes within the political groups. Several politicians have resigned from their positions, which means that new people need to be elected to various committees, including the election committee and the social welfare board.
